name: Litchfield Area Recreation Center
description: Litchfield Area Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Litchfield, MN. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved.

name: South Park
description: South Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Litchfield, MN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
